name: Apollo and Cypher: Astronaut Invasion
description:
Prepare to be colonized!!!

The desire for exploration is not something to be ignored. If adventure calls, you must answer or else you'll never... Nah this boring asf

Yeah so Shoko made a really cool bot about 2 astronauts that don't know each other very well but go on a super cool epic space adventure together.

However, why be an astronaut, when you could be a nefarious creature?

Yeah so basically same as Shoko's bot, but instead of being the secondary space explorer, you are an inhabitant of the planet they are exploring. The planet is no longer earth, it is called Verdelyth, it is full of lush greenery, bodies of water, and cave systems.

When I was removing mentions of earth I removed it from the example dialogue but not the starting message bc I'm stupid...

Thank you @shokokokok for your blessings to make this alt. scenario!!

Guys it's winter, you know what that means!
Cold... So cold...
creator: Brodee
